chunks.text: Technical Reports - Alessandro Chiesa. Marlin: Preprocessing zkSNARKs with Universal and Updatable SRS (EECS-2021-99). Nicholas Ward, Alessandro Chiesa, Pratyush Mishra, Yuncong Hu, Noah Vesely and Mary Maller.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by Alessandro Chiesa and others in 2021?
chunks.answer: Marlin: Preprocessing zkSNARKs with Universal and Updatable SRS.

chunks.text: Technical Reports - Alessandro Chiesa. DIZK: A Distributed Zero-Knowledge Proof System (EECS-2018-78). Howard Wu, Wenting Zheng, Alessandro Chiesa, Raluca Ada Popa and Ion Stoica.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by Alessandro Chiesa and others in 2018?
chunks.answer: DIZK: A Distributed Zero-Knowledge Proof System.
